title: Elden Kingdom
description: Explore the enhanced Minecraft world with The Warseed—new mobs, advanced storage, and immersive magical and medieval landscapes, all centered on the Create mod.
body:
this is a mod pack that keeps on adding more mods as a progresses you can also join the server if you want to see the process as well you can join in the Discord or you can join the minecraft server.

sooner down the line there will be more mods this will also get technical in the near future but is also going to be based off of a theme more of a old type of theme.
